case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. MARY LOU RENNER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF FRANK P. AGNOST, JR. RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION
